text:
is a song composed by Kunihiko Murai and Michio Yamagami. It was featured in the soundtrack of the film Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance released in 2009, where it is performed by Megumi Hayashibara.

It was published on the album Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack under the title "Tsubasa wo Kudasai". In the second disc of the special edition of this album, an extended version of this song is available under the title "Tsubasa wo Kudasai - Tribute to "Sound of Music"".

In the film, it plays during the Near Third Impact.

Ima watashi no negaigoto ga
Kanau naraba tsubasa ga hoshii
Kono senaka ni tori no you ni
Shiroi tsubasa tsukete kudasai

Kono oozora ni tsubasa wo hiroge
Tonde yukitai yo
Kanashimi no nai jiyuu na sora e

Ima mo onaji yume ni miteiru

Kono oozora ni tsubasa wo hiroge

Now,
if my wish comes true,
I want wings
Grant me white wings on my back like a bird.
 
I want to spread my wings in this sky
and fly.
To the free sky without sadness,
I want to flutter my wings and go.
 
What I dreamed of
when I was a kid.
I still have the same dream
in my heart.
 
I want to spread my wings in this sky
and fly.
To the free sky without sadness,
I want to flutter my wings and go.
 
I want to spread my wings in this sky and fly.
To the free sky without sadness,
I want to flutter my wings.

今も同じ夢に見ている

この大空に翼をひろげ
飛んで行きたいよ

翼はためかせ

Staff

Composition: Kunihiko Murai
Lyrics: Michio Yamagami
Arrangements: Motoki Funayama, Shirō Sagisu
Vocals: Megumi Hayashibara

Discography

2009: Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Original Soundtrack
2020: EVANGELION FINALLY
